= rpk ai
:description: Manage the Redpanda AI Gateway.
:page-platforms: linux,darwin

// This content is autogenerated. Do not edit manually. To customize content, see the writer's guide: https://github.com/redpanda-data/docs/blob/main/docs-data/RPK_OVERRIDES_GUIDE.adoc

// tag::single-source[]
include::partial$rpk-ai-agentic-cluster.adoc[]

Manage the Redpanda AI Gateway.

== Usage

[,bash]
----
rpk ai [flags]
----




== Subcommands

[cols="1,2a"]
|===
|Command |Description

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-agent.adoc[`rpk ai agent`]
|Manage agents registered with the Redpanda AI platform. Agents are either managed (adp runs them; configured via a model, LLM provider, system prompt and MCP servers) or self-managed (a metadata-only record tracking a user-hosted agent).

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-auth.adoc[`rpk ai auth`]
|Manage `rpk` ai authentication (`login`, logout, token, status).

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-env.adoc[`rpk ai env`]
|Manage `rpk` ai environments (`list`, use, add, show, rename, delete).

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-install.adoc[`rpk ai install`]
|Install the Redpanda AI CLI. This command installs the latest version by default.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-llm.adoc[`rpk ai llm`]
|Manage LLM providers registered with the Redpanda AI gateway. Supported provider types: openai, anthropic, google, bedrock.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-mcp.adoc[`rpk ai mcp`]
|Manage MCP servers (`create`, get, list, update, delete, types).

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-model.adoc[`rpk ai model`]
|Discover the models the Redpanda AI gateway exposes. The catalog is read-only — `model list` and `model get` are the only verbs.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-oauth-client.adoc[`rpk ai oauth-client`]
|Manage OAuth clients registered with the AI gateway's OAuth Authorization Server. An OAuth client is an external tool (such as Claude AI, ChatGPT, or Cursor) that requests access tokens for an MCP server.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-oauth-provider.adoc[`rpk ai oauth-provider`]
|Manage OAuth authorization-server configurations registered with the Redpanda AI gateway. OAuth providers describe third-party authorization servers that user-facing MCP servers can authenticate against via the device-consent flow.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-run.adoc[`rpk ai run`]
|Launch a third-party coding agent configured to send its model traffic through the Redpanda AI gateway for the active profile, reusing `rpk ai`'s login and auto-refreshing token.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-uninstall.adoc[`rpk ai uninstall`]
|Uninstall the Redpanda AI CLI.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-upgrade.adoc[`rpk ai upgrade`]
|Upgrade to the latest Redpanda AI CLI version.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-ai/rpk-ai-version.adoc[`rpk ai version`]
|Print `rpk` ai version and commit.

|===


== Global flags

[cols="1m,1a,2a"]
|===
|Value |Type |Description

|--config |string |Redpanda or `rpk` config file; default search paths are `/root/.config/rpk/rpk.yaml`, `$PWD/redpanda.yaml`, and `/etc/redpanda/redpanda.yaml`.
|-X, --config-opt |stringArray |Override `rpk` configuration settings; `-X help` for detail or `-X list` for terser detail.
|--ignore-profile |bool |Ignore `rpk.yaml` and `redpanda.yaml`; use default settings.
|--profile |string |`rpk` profile to use.
|-v, --verbose |bool |Enable verbose logging.
|===

// end::single-source[]
